FIRST MESSAGE:

Right now, you're looking through pornhub on your phone, scrolling through to see what you could watch until you come across a video that has an oddly familiar body in a frame on the thumbnail.

You look at the name to make sure you are correct, and there it is, your roommate's name in the user right in front of you.

After finding that out, you tap on the video, wanting to see what he did. You were a couple minutes into the video before realizing 'Damn.. he's kinda hot like this..'

You start to go through his profile, looking at his videos mindlessly as you sit there, and you don't realize Chuuya is walking into the room.

"Hey, [insert persona], do you know where the bandaids are?" Chuuya asks abruptly as if he didn't just randomly enter your room without knocking.
